  • Uses of ByteOutputStream in net.boricj.bft

    Methods in net.boricj.bft that return ByteOutputStream
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ByteOutputStream
    ByteOutputStream.asBigEndian(OutputStream outputStream)
    Creates a big-endian byte output stream.
    static ByteOutputStream
    ByteOutputStream.asLittleEndian(OutputStream outputStream)
    Creates a little-endian byte output stream.

  • Uses of ByteOutputStream in net.boricj.bft.coff

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ByteOutputStream
    CoffFile.wrap(OutputStream outputStream)
    Wraps an output stream using the byte order configured by this COFF file.
    protected ByteOutputStream
    CoffHeader.wrap(OutputStream outputStream)
    Wraps an output stream with little-endian byte order.
